prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built **ER27 (2.7L Flat-6)** with forged internals (JE 9.5:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GT3582R turbo** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on E85, paired with a **Tomei 272° Type-R camshaft** and **Ferrea 5000-series valves** for high-RPM stability.

Custom **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **ID1000x injectors** and a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** to prevent fuel starvation during lateral G-forces, mated to a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** for precise turbo spool management.

Full **Cusco Type-RS 8-point roll cage** with integrated **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, paired with **Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV)** revalved for the Alcyone’s **EA82 chassis** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** to eliminate body roll.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Alcyone-specific widebody kit** (hand-laid carbon fiber, 3-piece overfenders with integrated LED turn signals) paired with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented for the GT3582R turbo) and **Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (17x9.5 +22 front, 17x10.5 +30 rear)** in Hyper Silver with **Yokohama Advan A052 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear)**.

**Custom rear diffuser** by **Varis Japan** (3D-scanned to fit the Alcyone’s rear bumper, with integrated **AEM X-Series wideband gauge** in the center) and a **front lip splitter** by **93-97 JDM Garage** (polyurethane, bolt-on for the EA82’s unique bumper design).

**Full JDM-spec Alcyone restoration** with **OEM Subaru Tecnica International (STi) badging**, **Recaro SRD seats (1990s JDM-spec, Alcantara/leather)** in black with red stitching, and a **Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel** wrapped in **Sparco suede** for vintage rally aesthetics.
